headline: This High-Conviction Dividend Stock Just Triggered a Rare Buying Opportunity for Passive Income Investors
summary: Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) is a stock built to be owned for decades, because it sits at the intersection of a non-discretionary service economy and a pricing model that compounds quietly through every macro regime. Republic Services trades at $204.94 after a 16.54% drawdown over the past year, and that pullback is the relevant detail for ... This High-Conviction Dividend Stock Just Triggered a Rare Buying Opportunity for Passive Income Investors

headline: WM to take over Seattle recyclables processing contract in 2027
summary: The new contract, long held by Republic Services subsidiary Rabanco, is meant to help fetch better commodities prices and divert more material from disposal, Seattle Public Utilities said.
